case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR VS. REINA H GOMEZ et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, REINA H INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY AS PARTNERS DBA TAQUERIA REYNA'S AKA TAQUERIA REINA'S RICO GARCIA SANCHEZ, ALCADIO INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY AS PARTNERS DBA TAQUERIA REYNA'S AKA TAQUERIA REINA'S RICO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, REINA H INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY AS PARTNERS DBA TAQUERIA REYNA'S AKA TAQUERIA REINA'S RICO GARCIA SANCHEZ, ALCADIO INDIVIDUALLY & JOINTLY AS PARTNERS DBA TAQUERIA REYNA'S AKA TAQUERIA REINA'S RICO $3,919.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,919.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
